CustomField.label: Upsert Key
CustomField.description: Composite external ID for idempotent upsert. Set by DR_Upsert_Detected_Layer to {programId}_{layerDeveloperName}. Re-running the GIS proximity check for the same project + layer updates the existing record rather than creating a duplicate. Must be a writable Text field (not formula) to serve as the Salesforce upsert external ID key.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Composite upsert key set automatically by the GIS proximity IP. Format: {ProgramId}_{LayerDeveloperName}.
